hero.body: XIPI is the pocket business assistant for African entrepreneurs: voice-powered, offline-first, in French and Wolof. Built for those who run their business every day.

portraits.label: XIPI is for you
portraits.title: Do you recognize yourself?
portraits.body: XIPI was designed with and for those who drive the economy every day.
portraits.card1Quote: "I manage my customers, measurements and payments, all by voice, no pen needed."
portraits.card2Quote: "I'm always busy: with XIPI I log my earnings in 5 seconds between clients."
portraits.card3Quote: "I finally know what my customers owe me. No more disputes, no more forgotten amounts."
portraits.card4Quote: "My pagne stock, my daily sales: XIPI gives me real visibility into my business."

problem.label: We understand you
problem.title: You manage everything in your head, and it's exhausting
problem.body: Existing financial tools are too complicated, too expensive, and not made for you. XIPI changes that.
problem.before1Title: All in your head, nothing reliable
problem.before1Body: Your accounts stay in your head or on a crumpled notebook. Mistakes, forgotten amounts, disputes: every day you're losing money without knowing it.
problem.before2Title: Tools that don't speak your language
problem.before2Body: Accounting software assumes computer and accounting skills that most of you haven't had time to acquire.
problem.before3Body: You don't know what people owe you, or whether your business is truly profitable. Every decision is made blind.
problem.before4Body: The tontine runs without traceability, tensions grow within the group and relationships fray.
problem.after1Body: Speak your sale aloud: Aida records everything, in French or Wolof. No typing, no forgetting.
problem.after2Title: A language that feels like yours
problem.after2Body: Intuitive icons, familiar vocabulary. No accounting terms, no training. Usable from the very first minute.
problem.after3Title: Your business visible at a glance
problem.after3Body: Revenue, expenses, receivables: all displayed in real time. You make better decisions, with confidence.
problem.after4Body: Every contribution tracked, every turn automatically reminded. Trust is restored, tensions disappear.

pillars.label: The foundations
pillars.title: Three principles that make all the difference
pillars.p1Body: XIPI works without a permanent internet connection. Your business doesn't stop when the connection drops. Data syncs as soon as the signal returns.
pillars.p2Body: Speak naturally in your language. Aida understands and records your data without you having to type a single character.
pillars.p3Body: Accounting vocabulary is replaced by intuitive icons. Usable from the very first moment, even without written French proficiency.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything your business needs
features.body: Financial management and business management, united in one tool designed for you.
features.desc1: View your revenue, expenses and cash balance in real time. Identify your income trends and make the right decisions at a glance.
features.desc2: Track each client, their ongoing orders, their full payment history and the status of each transaction: paid, pending or overdue.
features.desc3: Every trade has its specifics. Tailor, hairdresser, artisan, merchant: Aida guides voice entry of your business-specific data.
features.desc4: Manage your inventory with automatic stock-out alerts. View your references by category and act before running out.
features.desc5: Record expenses by voice command, OCR invoice scan or manual entry. Auto-categorize and track your cash in real time.
features.desc6: Generate numbered invoices with discounts, payment methods (Wave, Orange Money, Cash) and share them instantly via WhatsApp or email.

slogan.label: OUR PROMISE
slogan.body: XIPI turns every transaction into a growth opportunity for your business.

vision.visionBody: An Africa where every entrepreneur has their place, where their work is seen, built and passed on, without language or education level deciding their success.
vision.missionBody: Give every entrepreneur the tools to run their business daily, in their local language, without internet required, and build day after day the value of what they have built.

values.title: Our values
values.v1Body: XIPI is designed to be accessible to all, regardless of language, education level or economic situation.
values.v2Body: Every feature is designed to be used immediately, without a manual, without training, from the first opening.
values.v3Body: Your data belongs to you. XIPI is registered with the CDP and never sells or shares your personal information.
values.v4Body: XIPI was born in Africa, for Africa. Every design decision is based on ground realities and local needs.

ai.body: XIPI's artificial intelligence understands your language, reads your invoices and warns you before problems arise.
ai.c1Body: Say "I sold a wax dress for 85,000 F CFA to Fanta": Aida understands, extracts the amount, client and description, and records the sale automatically.
ai.c2Body: Photograph any invoice: the AI automatically extracts the amount, date and category. Zero manual entry.
ai.c3Title: Aida warns you before it's too late
ai.c3Body: Imminent stock-out, client overdue, tontine deadline: Aida monitors your business and sends the right alerts at the right time.
ai.c3Alert2: Overdue · Fanta Sane · 7 days without payment
ai.c4Body: Aida recognizes the voice context, suggests the right form and pre-fills the fields. You validate, that's all.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, clear, accessible
pricing.body: One subscription, all inclusive. No commitment.
pricing.sub: per month, no commitment · Free trial included

security.label: Security & Privacy
security.title: Your data belongs to you
security.body: XIPI was designed to protect your information at every step, with clear and verifiable guarantees.
security.s1Body: XIPI is registered with Senegal's Personal Data Protection Commission (CDP). Your data is processed in compliance with law n° 2008-12 on data protection.
security.s2Body: Access protected by personal PIN code. Each user only accesses data authorized to them. Automatic logout on inactivity.
security.s3Body: All your data is encrypted on the device and during synchronizations. Your personal information is never sold or shared with third parties.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: We're here to listen
contact.body: A question, a suggestion or need assistance? Write to us directly.
contact.formSuccess: Message sent! We will get back to you soon.

cta.title: Ready to take control of your business?
cta.body: Join the first XIPI users in Dakar from June 2026. Free trial, no commitment.

aida_section.body: Aida is much more than a mascot. She is your intelligent assistant who speaks your language, guides every action, answers your questions and makes financial management as simple as a conversation.
aida_section.bullet2: Handles your trade's specifics, whatever your sector
aida_section.bullet3: Reminds you of overdue payments and tontine deadlines
aida_section.bullet4: Close to you, available at all times

footer.tagline: The business assistant for African entrepreneurs. Voice-powered, offline, in French and Wolof.
